# Pensacola Military Housing

> The authoritative resource for military families PCSing to, selling in, or buying real estate across the Florida Panhandle. Run by Gregg Costin — retired USAF Combat Systems Officer (E-3 AWACS, 20 years), 11 personal PCS moves, MRP/ABR/SRS/RENE certified Realtor at Levin Rinke Realty, licensed in Florida and Alabama.

## About

Gregg Costin is a retired United States Air Force Combat Systems Officer who served 20 years on the E-3 AWACS platform, completing 11 personal PCS moves and multiple combat deployments before transitioning to full-time real estate. He holds Military Relocation Professional (MRP), Accredited Buyer's Representative (ABR), Seller Representative Specialist (SRS), Real Estate Negotiation Expert (RENE), and Florida Military Specialist certifications, and is currently pursuing GRI and broker licensure. He is licensed in Florida and Alabama and operates out of Levin Rinke Realty at 220 W. Garden Street, Pensacola, FL 32502. Direct line: (850) 266-5005.

## Service Area

- Pensacola, FL (Escambia County)
- Gulf Breeze, FL (Santa Rosa County)
- Navarre, FL (Santa Rosa County)
- Pace, FL (Santa Rosa County)
- Milton, FL (Santa Rosa County)
- Cantonment, FL (Escambia County)
- Perdido Key, FL (Escambia County)
- Niceville, FL (Okaloosa County)
- Fort Walton Beach, FL (Okaloosa County)
- Crestview, FL (Okaloosa County)
- Mary Esther, FL (Okaloosa County)

## Military Installations Supported

- NAS Pensacola — Cradle of Naval Aviation, primary training for Navy/Marine/Coast Guard aviators, home of NATTC, NETC, and the Blue Angels. MHA FL064. ZIP 32508.
- Corry Station — Navy Center for Information Warfare Training (CIWT).
- NAS Whiting Field — Primary and intermediate fixed-wing and helicopter training, Milton FL.
- Eglin Air Force Base — 96th Test Wing, 33rd Fighter Wing (F-35A), Niceville/Fort Walton Beach area.
- Hurlburt Field — Air Force Special Operations Command (AFSOC), 1st SOW, Mary Esther/Fort Walton Beach area.

## Key Content

- [Homepage](https://pensacolamilitaryhousing.com/): Overview, agent bio, service pillars, testimonials.
- [PCS Guide](https://pensacolamilitaryhousing.com/pcs): Pensacola real estate market snapshot, neighborhood comparison matrix (8 areas with price/commute/schools/lifestyle), 90/60/30-day PCS timeline checklist.
- [VA Loans](https://pensacolamilitaryhousing.com/va-loan): VA vs. Conventional vs. FHA comparison, VA Pamphlet 26-7 Chapter 8 seller concession guidance, eligibility requirements.
- [NAS Pensacola Housing Guide](https://pensacolamilitaryhousing.com/nas): Base overview, top neighborhoods, full 2026 BAH table by pay grade (E-1 through O-7, with/without dependents), insider tips for pipeline aviators vs. permanent party.
- [Whiting Field Housing Guide](https://pensacolamilitaryhousing.com/whiting): Milton/Pace corridor, primary training pipeline housing strategy.
- [Corry Station Housing Guide](https://pensacolamilitaryhousing.com/corry): CIWT training duration, student housing recommendations.
- [Eglin AFB Housing Guide](https://pensacolamilitaryhousing.com/eglin): Niceville/FWB market, F-35 community considerations.
- [Hurlburt Field Housing Guide](https://pensacolamilitaryhousing.com/hurlburt): AFSOC community, Mary Esther/Navarre beach access.
- [Neighborhoods](https://pensacolamilitaryhousing.com/neighborhoods): Full comparison across Gulf Breeze, Pace/Milton, Perdido Key, East Pensacola Heights, Cantonment, Navarre with price ranges.
- [Homestead Exemption](https://pensacolamilitaryhousing.com/homestead): Florida homestead exemption rules for active duty and retired military.
- [Reviews](https://pensacolamilitaryhousing.com/reviews): Client testimonials from military families and Zillow Premier Agent rating.
- [Contact](https://pensacolamilitaryhousing.com/contact): (850) 266-5005 direct line, contact form.

## Specializations

- PCS (Permanent Change of Station) relocation planning and execution
- VA Loan buyer representation (including Title 10/Title 32 Guard/Reserve eligibility)
- BAH-based buy-vs-rent analysis for each pay grade
- Pipeline aviator short-term housing strategy (12-18 month orders)
- Permanent party long-term buying strategy (3+ year orders)
- Military home selling with PCS timeline coordination
- Retired military homestead and Florida residency planning
- Sight-unseen purchase representation for deployed service members
